title: Personalization
subtitle: Title generation, Agent companion, thinking process, and debug mode

sessionTitle.title: Auto Session Title
sessionTitle.subtitle: AI automatically generates concise titles for new conversations
sessionTitle.warning: Session title will use first 20 characters of user message

agentCompanion.title: Agent companion
agentCompanion.subtitle: Show a pixel-style companion animation in the collapsed chat input.

thinkingProcess.title: Thinking process
thinkingProcess.subtitle: Control how model thinking content is shown in FlowChat.
thinkingProcess.showProcessDescription: When off, FlowChat no longer shows model thinking output.
thinkingProcess.keepCompletedItemDescription: After a thinking output finishes and auto-collapses, keep an expandable thinking item in FlowChat.

models.empty: No available models. Please add models in "Models" first.
